name: Star Wealth Group, Inc.
summary: Star Wealth Group, Inc. does not have significant operations. Previously, it was involved in the production of flyers, posters, and printing images on multiple surfaces, such as glass, leather, and plastic. The company was formerly known as Terafox Corp. and changed its name to Star Wealth Group, Inc. in December 2017. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Tsim Sha Tsui , Hong Kong. Star Wealth Group, Inc. is a subsidiary of Smart Mate Limited.
